[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000000100 1
1 011110000 4
2 111101000 5
3 111110010 6
4 100111101 6
5 111111111 a
6 010101010 4
7 111110111 8

01 10 111110110 7
12 21 101111101 7
23 32 101111101 7
34 43 010111110 6
45 54 110111111 8
56 65 100011111 6
67 76 101011111 7
70 07 111101111 8

02 20 111111111 a match 5
13 31 100111100 5
24 42 111111111 a match 5
35 53 100101111 6
46 64 010110111 6
57 75 101001111 6
60 06 111110111 8 match 7
71 17 101111101 7

25 52 101111111 8
36 63 000111111 6
47 74 111111111 a match 5
50 05 111101111 8
